semantic_boundary_principle: Promotion is normalization into a reviewable proposal contract, not a folder move.

working_draft.description: Exploratory, uneven, or implementation-heavy material that has not yet been normalized into a graph-facing review surface.

reviewable_proposal.description: A normalized proposal artifact with one bounded concern, a clear problem statement, explicit goals and non-goals, and reviewable provenance.

notes: Repository paths may project draft versus proposal state, but file layout is not the sole source of semantic meaning. Transition packets and promotion provenance own the governed distinction.
